horoscope: There can be something on your mind early today, dear Aries, involving some uncertainty about your next step. However, there are also some wonderful opportunities now that can pull you out of it as the day advances. You may need to make a small adjustment to get back on track. The day shapes up to be terrific for energy, confidence, and spirit. A Mars-Jupiter transit is creative, and you can have some great ideas for handling money or home-related matters. There can be great prospects involving your family or home life. Your sense of timing is powerful, and you can be quite resourceful. Enthusiasm runs high for making money and taking care of your personal things. You're inclined to want to make things happen now, rather than merely think about your next step. Anything that improves your sense of safety and security will appeal now.

Early today, you may be feeling blocked or held back, dear Taurus, and it would be wise to slow down to handle your responsibilities before pressing ahead. As the day advances, however, both your timing and confidence improve. A Mars-Jupiter transit encourages you. You could discover wonderful opportunities that brighten your day and fuel your ambition or enthusiasm, likely related to communications projects, learning, or transportation. Problems that previously seemed too difficult to solve now appear only as small obstacles. It's a good time for personal appeal as you come across as amiably direct and confident. You're a little more willing to go out on a limb in order to move something forward, and inclined to express yourself confidently.

Early today, there can be a block to break through, dear Gemini. Patience is necessary, as pushing may only serve to increase resistance. However, as the day progresses, you're feeling more creative and optimistic. A Mars-Jupiter aspect encourages your confidence in managing problems or dealing with stressful situations. You're ready to take on a challenge. Ideas about money or business are uniquely innovative. You can feel rejuvenated, especially if you have the chance to rest or otherwise remove yourself from demanding situations so you can gather yourself. Benefits come from hidden places or from resources you never knew you had. An action taken now might open the doors to an increase in income down the road.

Early today, up and down energy levels can plague you as Mars forms a challenging aspect with Saturn, dear Cancer. You can get frustrated easily, as blocks or obstacles seem to slow you down. Still, this can be a blessing in disguise, as slowing down may be exactly what you need to do right now. As the day advances, your sense of timing strengthens. A Mars-Jupiter transit is especially fortunate for you. Confidence-boosting situations emerge now, and you're ready to rise to a challenge. You're on top of your game. It's a great time for reaching out and connecting with others. Both cooperative and competitive efforts can thrive now. The key is taking some form of action to improve, grow, and advance. Sharing activities with others can lead to something very special and quite enterprising, or you may be gathering up a team/group or drawing upon the resources of an associate in order to move a project forward.

Early today, you could face some blocks, dear Leo. You may be dealing with tensions, differences of opinion, or concerns about the future that weigh on your mind and require resolution before you feel confident to move full steam ahead. You may be managing insecurities, but this is not necessarily a setback, as it can be a necessary process. Deal with fears of not meeting your responsibilities or living up to others' standards. Once beyond these issues, the day shapes up to be an enterprising one. With a Mars-Jupiter transit, unacknowledged emotions and needs surface, and you're playful and expressive, wanting to make your mark. There can be a sense that you can take on a lot on a professional level, or there can be breakthroughs that stir your ambition and enthusiasm.

Tension can arise early today if you have too much on your plate, dear Virgo. Blocks are likely if you try to push something forward. Try to tackle things one at a time rather than wear yourself out, and avoid overexertion or stretching yourself too thin. As the day advances, however, you're especially hopeful about the future, and opportunities to grow and expand your skills or a project can emerge. A Mars-Jupiter transit comes into play, and it boosts your confidence and mood. It's particularly excellent for friendships, studies, and invigorating experiences. Shared activities can be especially fun or productive. There can be special enjoyment in reading, learning, or studying now as well.

This is a potentially powerful day for creative expression, dear Libra, but early today, you may face obstacles. If you're getting ahead of yourself, you'll be reminded of the constraints of time now. However, as the day advances, a Mars-Jupiter transit adds a "can-do" feel to the day. You're ready to solve problems and move forward. There can be renewed energy for research and projects. As well, good energy is with you for setting things right with money. You can feel excited about a wellness pursuit, and you're ready to take on a challenge. This energy is confident and optimistic, and you can use a nice dose of it right now.

You're likely to enjoy inspiration with the information coming into your world today, dear Scorpio. Still, early today, Mars faces a small challenge with Saturn, pointing to possible blocks or conflicting desires that slow you down. Finding a balance between responsibilities and desires can help smooth things over. As the day advances, energies are especially forward-looking. A Mars-Jupiter aspect boosts your confidence that you have all the tools you need. You're confident, optimistic, and seeing opportunities and possibilities. Later today can feel full of possibilities and opportunities. You are courageous and forthright.

Early today, there can be a minor setback that prevents you from pushing your plans forward, dear Sagittarius. However, the rest of the day is strong for confidence and optimism. In fact, today's energies favor productivity and cleverness. With work and routines, you're particularly on the ball, ready to do something different or new. You're enthusiastic about getting to the bottom of a matter. Work can be exciting and motivating, or you’re putting in the extra effort to improve your health. Personal appeal is strong, and a spirit of competition spurs you into motion.

You can be feeling pleasingly motivated and directed today, dear Capricorn, but you may need to get over a hurdle early today, likely to do with attempting to go forward too quickly. However, once you've digested the lesson that slowing down in some areas makes sense, you're in a far more confident position. A Mars-Jupiter transit comes into play and encourages taking action on a matter, even if it's small and symbolic. You are in great shape for relating in positive, growth-oriented, and confident ways. You have more courage to express your affection, and this confidence tends to be well-received by others. You could feel that things are coming together.

Early today, there can be some frustration with a project that isn't moving fast enough for you, dear Aquarius, but you gain a can-do attitude as the day advances. A Mars-Jupiter transit comes into play and encourages you to stay active and positive while pacing yourself well. With Mars still in your family and home sector, an engaging domestic project or activity may be precisely what you need. You're confident about solving problems today. You can derive pleasure from doing a job well, or a sense of accomplishment after taking care of important details. Work and home life are areas of special interest, and with your heart engaged, you can move mountains now. You're bound to discover ways to improve and advance your projects.

You are a little more performance-oriented than usual today, dear Pisces. Early today, you may be stepping on the brakes, however, if you feel others are pushing you too hard. But as the day advances, your sense of timing clicks in as a feel-good transit comes into play and encourages you to tackle problems with energy and confidence. It's also a strong influence for romantic and creative pursuits, and it tends to favor you in competitions. There may be good news or information absorbed today that boosts your confidence in the future. This can be a time when a courageous attitude makes things happen for you. You're finding solutions, support, and opportunities now.
